custom_css: @media only screen and (min-width:769px){.feature-row {flex-direction: column; max-width: 80%; margin: 0px auto; padding-top: 50px;}.feature-row__item * {color: #fff;}.feature-row__item.feature-row__text.feature-row__text--left {padding: 0px !important; margin: 60px auto 60px !important;}.video-wrapper {transform: unset;} }

settings.title: Image with text
settings.text: Pair large text with an image to tell a story, explain a detail about your product, or describe a new promotion.
